heading: Special considerations in awarding scholarships and grants
label: 2200c Special considerations in awarding scholarships and grants
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “Special considerations in awarding scholarships and grants” for “Centers of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 115–2322017— substituted “Cyber” for “Information Assurance” in heading and in pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 115–91

Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–91, div. A, title XVI, § 1649(e)(2)131 Stat. 1753Dec. 12, 2017“Any institution of higher education designated by the Director of the National Security Agency as a Center of Academic Excellence in Information Assurance Education is redesignated as a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education. Any reference in a law (other than this section), map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to a Center of Academic Excellence in Information Assurance Education shall be deemed to be a reference to a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education.”
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “Special considerations in awarding scholarships and grants” for “Centers of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. A, title XVI, § 1649(e)(2)131 Stat. 1753Dec. 12, 2017“Any institution of higher education designated by the Director of the National Security Agency as a Center of Academic Excellence in Information Assurance Education is redesignated as a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education. Any reference in a law (other than this section), map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to a Center of Academic Excellence in Information Assurance Education shall be deemed to be a reference to a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education.”

children.heading: .—Centers of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education
children.label: a .—Centers of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education

children.text: in the case of a scholarship, the institution at which the recipient pursues a degree is a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education; and
in the case of a grant, the recipient is a Center of Academic Excellence in Cyber Education.

in the case of a scholarship, the institution of higher education at which the recipient pursues a degree is an institution described in section 371(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (); and20 U.S.C. 1067q(a)
in the case of a grant, the recipient is an institution described in such section.
